title: IT287R2 ARCHIVED - Sale of Inventory - Canada.ca

## IT287R2 ARCHIVED - Sale of Inventory

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin discusses the disposition of the inventory of a business upon or after disposing of or ceasing to carry on all or part of the business.
